Class/Contract C000260947Direxion Daily PYPL Bull 2X Shares
Class/Contract C000260948Direxion Daily PYPL Bear 1X Shares
Class/Contract C000260949Direxion Daily RDDT Bull 2X Shares

Direxion Daily PYPL Bull 2X Shares seeks daily investment results tied to the common shares of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL).

Direxion Daily PYPL Bear 1X Shares seeks daily inverse investment results tied to the common shares of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL).
